channel.title: Compress on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Compress on Tech Tracker

item.title: Photo Tools - best app to compress, crop, resize, convert images.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-Qux5oXy1UmM/YbzLYgIAU8I/AAAAAAAAH6o/Gd36Ga7vcTAzWkWD5Ej8KXsxL3Ia1wi_ACNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1639762782907896-0.png" alt=""> You can capture photos or design images in which ever format or resolution you like, however the size of image depends on two factors which are resolution and format, if you have higher resolution image then size of the images will be big else it will be low, majority of people capture photos in good resolution to get best possible details, but due to storage issues & social messaging apps and specific websites size limits alot of people want to compress, resize, crop & resize thier existing images.

item.title: How to rename telegram files using telegram bot for free.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-lsakELPSMQk/YbOCi0u8tPI/AAAAAAAAH0Q/3ylUXzWqXf8rPx4bc1I801rdGfMZS6owwCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1639154311345046-0.png" alt=""> Telegram is one of the most popular social messaging app founded by pavel durov and nikoloi durov where millons of users create different types of channels and groups in numerous categories to share various files like movies, music, archives, documents etc so users whoever require them can download but the only issue here is on telegram it is not possible to rename files once sent, so people have no option other then to download any size to internal storage then rename it.

item.title: How to compress images in android !
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-VKPJT47Pruo/X6AiQVoFKcI/AAAAAAAACFM/Q1ZmsdHL_hEjs0TTNU8gdPrQ0ioQ0wacwCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1604330044340888-0.png" alt=""> We need to compress images for various reasons and most of the images are in .jpg or.png formats and other advanced formats like .webp are less in size there is no need to reduce size of it. In .JPG which used for regular photos while .PNG which used for logo’s based on your requirement the type of image format will be used, while .webp is advanced image format used for websites.
